name: The Knocker
description:
CW: NSFW INTRO AND CODED VIOLENCE.

You're a fellow dweller

Uh Oh! Seems you've found yourself in a bad position! Now you're stuck, and can only rely on your friend for help.

I got this idea while playing Minecraft Dwellers mod with a friend so...here y'all go! Go wild.
creator: Cursedzzz
